title: 'Burnham will push to be next PM' and 'Dosh and Becks'
description: Andy Burnham entering the race to become the next prime minister is the focus of today's papers.

title: Josef Mengele: Switzerland finally to open secret files on Nazis' Auschwitz 'Angel of Death'
description: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.
content:
The Swiss Federal Intelligence Service has said it will finally open long-sealed files on the notorious Nazi war criminal Josef Mengele, but without saying when.

title: Man hit by van in Birmingham after residents take down union flags put up by anti-migrant group
description: Police investigate incident on Thursday after witness claims seeing Raise the Colours logo on side of vehicle
content:
Police are investigating an incident where a man was run over by a van after a group of people were taking down union flags put up by Raise the Colours campaigners in Birmingham.

title: Pep Guardiola: Man City manager insists he has 'one more year' on deal
description: Manager Pep Guardiola insists he has "one more year" remaining on his contract at Manchester City as speculation continues over his future at the club.
content:
Manager Pep Guardiola insists he has "one more year" remaining on his contract at Manchester City as speculation continues over his future.

title: Chaotic underdogs Chelsea have shot at glory to close out season of disruption
description: A defiant performance against Manchester City could deliver silverware in a year in which the club has already sacked two head coaches
